# Mnestis

> The memory layer for software — local-first codebase intelligence for humans and AI.

- Website: https://mnestis.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/bitreonx/Mnestis
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/mnestis
- Install: npx mnestis launch . --platform cursor

## What it does

Mnestis scans a repository, builds a dependency graph, discovers domains, capabilities, and user journeys, and writes structured memory to `.mnemos/`. It produces a dashboard, HTML report, AI Pack v1 JSON, and MCP tools for Cursor and Claude Code.

## Primary commands

- `npx mnestis .` — analyze repo and generate DNA
- `npx mnestis launch . --platform cursor` — build + install Cursor rules + MCP
- `npx mnestis launch . --platform claude` — build + Claude skills + Fable mindset
- `mnestis mcp` — stdio MCP server for architecture queries

## Docs

- https://mnestis.vercel.app/docs
